candidates.why: Explicit line aggregating revenue and other operating income; only revenue-like candidate and matches top-line concept.
Clearly a cost of goods sold / direct production input cost line on the income statement; matches COGS definition.
Inventory component on the balance sheet, not a period expense; not appropriate for COGS in PROF mapping.
Revenue line, not an operating overhead expense; should not be used for SG&A.
Best available overhead bucket capturing operating expenses excluding COGS; appropriate SG&A proxy in absence of more detailed SG&A breakdown.
This is income, not expense; should not be classified as SG&A cost.
Specific operating overhead expense line that fits SG&A definition (other operating expenses).

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization/D&A item, which we must explicitly exclude from SG&A under the rules.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A line; using broad operating expenses plus specific miscellaneous other operating expense as SG&A components while excluding D&A and income lines.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line on income statement, even though preview shows nan values; per rules, presence of label implies values in at least one year.
Balance sheet inventory, not R&D expense.
Capitalized development costs on balance sheet, not period R&D expense.
Accumulated amortization of capitalized development costs; not the R&D expense line itself.
Net interest line; good fallback if specific gross interest expense lines are unavailable for some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Specific interest expense measure net of capitalized interest, conceptually closest to pure interest expense; good backup indicator.
Interest component of lease costs; a narrower form of interest expense; useful if main interest lines are missing.
Primary gross interest expense line with consistent negative amounts; best first-choice for XINT.
Another label for interest expense with similar magnitudes and signs; strong secondary choice.
Capitalized portion of interest, not expense recognized in P&L; generally excluded from XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; part of total interest expense; good tertiary backup.
Interest component of pension obligations; a smaller component of total interest cost; useful as further fallback.
Capitalized interest, not current period expense; should be excluded from XINT measure focused on expense.
Refers to minority interest in net income, not interest expense; irrelevant for XINT.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity attribution, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Part of comprehensive income allocation, unrelated to interest expense.
Supplemental interest expense label but preview shows nan; could be alternate reporting for some years, minor backup.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; narrower than total interest but valid as deep fallback.
Balance sheet derivative classification, not P&L interest expense.
Also balance sheet item, not interest expense.
Balance sheet receivables, not interest expense.
Debt on balance sheet, not interest expense flow.
Long-term debt on balance sheet; not the interest expense line.
Equity item; not interest expense.
Equity item; not interest expense.
Label is generic; but appears in debt maturity supplements, not clearly an income statement interest expense line here.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list starts with the main gross interest expense lines, then net-of-capitalized and net interest, followed by lease and pension interest components as fallbacks.

candidates.row_label: Carried against equity in associates and joint ventures
candidates.why: OCI-related adjustment, not a total equity balance.
Refers to equity-method investments income, not book equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Investments accounted for using equity method
candidates.why: Investment asset, not shareholders’ equity.
Component of equity, but not total book equity.
Major component of parent equity, but still not the full total including other reserves and minorities.

candidates.row_label: Items charged to equity in associates and JV
candidates.why: Reserve component within equity; not total equity.
Subtotal of parent equity components; not clearly the full book equity including all items.
Total equity attributable to owners of the parent (excl. NCI) by amount; close to book equity but excludes minorities.
Represents total equity including non-controlling interests (matches Total equity + Non-controlling interests); best proxy for book equity of the firm.

variables.notes: Equity includes non-controlling interests and best reflects total book equity; Total equity (parent) kept as backup.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; flow measure, not balance, but confirms labeling.
Same as non-controlling interests on income statement; flow attribution.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow to NCI, not the balance-sheet minority interest.
Balance sheet line for minority interest in equity; primary target for MIB.
Alternate label for the same minority equity; good secondary choice.
